notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Parker Meadows pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Parker Meadows singles on a ground ball to shortstop Brooks Lee, deflected by pitcher Justin Topa. Kerry Carpenter to 3rd. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson flies out sharply to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Cole Sands. Riley Greene scores. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Parker Meadows pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Parker Meadows called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Parker Meadows pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Parker Meadows grounds into a force out, pitcher Kody Funderburk to shortstop Brooks Lee. Riley Greene to 3rd. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Parker Meadows to 1st.
